description: A vertical graphic built on a darkened close-up photograph of a young man with thick dark hair facing the camera. A small Breitbart logo sits in the lower-center, above a bold white serif headline reading Biden-Released Illegal Alien Accused of Repeatedly Raping 12-Year-Old Girl. A small Department of Homeland Security seal appears at the bottom edge.
notable_text: BREITBART; Biden-Released Illegal Alien Accused of Repeatedly Raping 12-Year-Old Girl
